parameters.query:
SELECT
    D.PTHNUM_0 AS BR,
    SUM(D.LINATIAMT_0) AS SUM_BRTTC_PAR_BR,
    D.POHNUM_0 AS BC,
    DP.XNUM_0 AS DFF,
    DP.XRAISON_0 AS Nom,
    DP.XMNT_0 AS MONTANT,
    (DP.XMNT_0 - SUM(D.LINATIAMT_0)) AS Ecart,
    DP.XFACT_0 AS FactureFrs,
    FORMAT(DP.XDATF_0, 'dd/MM/yyyy') AS Date,
    DP.XCODF_0 AS Code
FROM BASE1.PRECEIPTD D
LEFT JOIN BASE1.PINVOICED PD ON D.PTHNUM_0 = PD.NUMORI_0
LEFT JOIN BASE1.PINVOICE E ON PD.NUM_0 = E.NUM_0
LEFT JOIN BASE1.XDEPFACT DP ON D.POHNUM_0 = DP.XCMD_0
LEFT JOIN BASE1.PRETURND PR ON D.PTHNUM_0 = PR.PTHNUM_0
WHERE PD.NUM_0 IS NULL
  AND D.PTHNUM_0 IS NOT NULL
  AND D.RCPDAT_0 >= '20250101'
  AND PR.PNHNUM_0 IS NULL
  AND DP.XFACT_0 IS NOT NULL
  AND D.POHNUM_0 IN (
        SELECT POHNUM_0
        FROM BASE1.PRECEIPTD
        GROUP BY POHNUM_0
        HAVING COUNT(PTHNUM_0) = 1
  )
GROUP BY
    D.PTHNUM_0,
    D.POHNUM_0,
    DP.XRAISON_0,
    DP.XNUM_0,
    DP.XMNT_0,
    DP.XFACT_0,
    DP.XCODF_0,
    DP.XDATF_0
HAVING DP.XMNT_0 - SUM(D.LINATIAMT_0) = 0
